title: Meeting Report: The First Evo-Devo Young Researchers Meeting.
author_string: Uchida, Yui, Ishida, Tasuku, Ono, Satomi, Kuroda, Shunya, Kobayashi, Aimi et al.
abstract: The official poster for the First Evo-Devo Young Researchers Meeting. It features the meeting title, themes ("Evo-Devo so far" and "Evo-Devo in the future"), invited speakers, program highlights, and logistical details. The content is written in Japanese.
